project.name: Mara Vale
project.description: Selected editorial design, research, and independent publishing work.
project.author: Mara Vale

data.intro: I turn research-heavy subjects into clear visual systems, publications, and digital experiences.
data.about: My work combines editorial judgment, information design, and careful production. I like projects where the structure is part of the argument.
data.currently: Developing an independent journal about overlooked civic systems.
data.closingTitle: A good project leaves the subject clearer than it found it.

projects.title: The Public Ledger
projects.description: A modular editorial identity and reading system for long-form reporting on public infrastructure.
